chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Present: Mr. Justice Omar Sial Mr. Justice Miran Muhammad Shah Const. Petition No. D - 4405 of 2025 [Dr. Nisar Moral & another vs. NAB & Others] Petitioners: through Mr. Shoaib Ali Khatian, advocate Respondent No.1: through Mr. Moazam Ali, Special Prosecutor NAB a/w Wahab Hussain, I.O. Date of hearing: 16.10.2025 Date of Order: 16.10.2025 ORDER Omar Sial, J: Learned counsel submits that the controversy has already been resolved by a Division Bench of this Court in C.P. No. D-6372 of 2021 as well as in C.P. No. 1409 of 2021. In terms of both orders passed in these petitions, respondents were directed to act as if there is no restriction anymore in terms of section 23. Section 23 of the NAO 1999 was deleted from the books by virtue of the 2022 NAB Amendment. The petitioners too are entitled for the same relief. Order accordingly. Petition stands disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE
